Interface IDateFormat3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that format date time with timezone support.

[Guid("52D08B30-1A68-4674-B0A3-BEC00640FEF5")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IDateFormat3 : IDateFormat2, IDateFormat
